name: User authentication backend
description: POST /auth/signup (public), POST /auth/login (public), POST /auth/refresh (requires auth) — JWT-based signup, login, token refresh.

name: Auth UI
description: Login and signup forms, token storage in localStorage for web and secure storage for mobile.

name: Product catalog management backend
description: GET /products (public), GET /products/{id} (public), POST /products (requires auth), PUT /products/{id} (requires auth), DELETE /products/{id} (requires auth) — Manages product data (name, price, stock).

name: Product catalog UI
description: Displays product list with search/filter, and forms for adding/editing products.

name: Shopping cart management backend
description: POST /cart/add (requires auth), PUT /cart/update/{item_id} (requires auth), DELETE /cart/remove/{item_id} (requires auth), GET /cart (requires auth), DELETE /cart/clear (requires auth) — Manages items in a user's current shopping cart.

name: Shopping cart UI
description: Displays current cart items, allows quantity adjustments, item removal, and clearing the cart.

name: Checkout & order processing backend
description: POST /checkout (requires auth) — Processes the cart into an order, deducts inventory, and generates a receipt.

name: Checkout UI
description: Provides the interface to review the cart and finalize a purchase.

name: Order history & receipt management backend
description: GET /orders (requires auth), GET /orders/{id} (requires auth) — Stores and retrieves past sales orders and their associated receipts.

name: Order history UI
description: Displays a list of past orders and individual receipt details.

name: Inventory stock management backend
description: GET /inventory (requires auth), PUT /inventory/{product_id}/adjust (requires auth) — Tracks and allows manual adjustment of product stock levels.

name: Inventory stock UI
description: Interface for viewing current stock levels and manually adjusting product stock.
